title: Prima facie evidence
doc_html:
§1906.  Prima facie evidence

Transaction of business as defined in R.S. 37:1901, by any person for a period of less than six months consecutively shall be prima facie evidence that the person was a transient merchant within the intent and meaning of this Part.
doc_text:
§1906.  Prima facie evidence
Transaction of business as defined in R.S. 37:1901, by any person for a period of less than six months consecutively shall be prima facie evidence that the person was a transient merchant within the intent and meaning of this Part.
